ck_gitlab_entity_identity_owner.name: ck_gitlab_entity_identity_owner
ck_gitlab_entity_identity_owner.value: "gitlab_entity_chat_mappings"."bound_via" <> 'identity_target' OR ("gitlab_entity_chat_mappings"."identity_link_id" IS NOT NULL AND "gitlab_entity_chat_mappings"."human_agent_id" IS NOT NULL AND "gitlab_entity_chat_mappings"."delegate_agent_id" IS NOT NULL AND "gitlab_entity_chat_mappings"."project_id" IS NOT NULL)

ck_members_completed_implies_suppressed.name: ck_members_completed_implies_suppressed
ck_members_completed_implies_suppressed.value: "members"."onboarding_completed_at" IS NULL OR "members"."onboarding_suppressed_at" IS NOT NULL

uq_notifications_org_dedup_unread.name: uq_notifications_org_dedup_unread
uq_notifications_org_dedup_unread.where: read = false AND dedup_key IS NOT NULL

uq_resources_team_repo_canonical_active.name: uq_resources_team_repo_canonical_active
uq_resources_team_repo_canonical_active.where: "resources"."type" = 'repo' AND "resources"."scope" = 'team' AND "resources"."status" IN ('active', 'stale') AND "resources"."repo_canonical_key" IS NOT NULL

uq_resources_agent_repo_canonical_active.name: uq_resources_agent_repo_canonical_active
uq_resources_agent_repo_canonical_active.where: "resources"."type" = 'repo' AND "resources"."scope" = 'agent' AND "resources"."status" IN ('active', 'stale') AND "resources"."repo_canonical_key" IS NOT NULL
